summary: Frontend-only regression on lp_smart estimate 8f95c9c2 (letrick 7-14-26 7pm). All 5 checks PASS.  (1) Model Comparison panel: does NOT render because this estimate only has 1 AI run (d6679448) in history — modelHistory is empty, panel is gated behind modelHistory.length > 0. Code inspection of AIMeasureButton.jsx:3383-3426 confirms header row is [Model, Conf, Windows, Doors, Walls, Siding ft², Eaves LF, Time] — NO Cost column, NO 'A/B spend' chip in the top bar (only 'Higher = winner'). Cost redaction ruling holding by design.  (2) 3D Model tab → Whole-house materials panel renders LP-native lines ONLY: '38 Series Lap 3/8" x 8" x 16'  227 PCS', '440 Series Trim 4" x 4" x 16'', '540 Series Trim 5/4" x 4" x 16'', '440 Series Trim 4" x 8" x 16'', 'Touch up kits', 'OSI Quad Max Caulking', 'J blocks', 'Mini Splits', '540 Series OSC 5/4" x 6" x 16'', 'LP Starter — field-ripped from siding stock', '38 Series Soffit 16 x 16 Vented'. Automated substring scan on the materials panel: has_charter_oak=False, has_dutch_lap=False, has_vinyl=False. LP-native pin holding.  (3) AIExtractionDebugModal opens via Advanced → Debug button (data-testid ai-measure-debug-btn). This modal is a SINGLE-run per-photo extraction viewer (photo cards P0-P7, wall reconciliation, openings table) — no run-picker rows (no debug-run-* testids). Automated scan of the entire debug modal innerText: NO '$' character anywhere. Cost-redaction holding on the debug path too.  (4) OpeningsReviewCard: clicked lp-or-remove-open:d6679448:0 (window row) → red warning surfaced with copy 'This opening feeds derived lines — 540 wrap trim (windows 4-side, 14 LF each)' plus REMOVE ANYWAY and CANCEL buttons (delete-guard). Clicked CANCEL → row returned to the three-button state (Confirm / Wrong type / Not present). Nothing was actually removed from the estimate.  (5) StickyBar top-right: data-testid='bar-tab-lp_smart-derived-unapplied' present with text 'Derived — not yet applied' (amber). No $0.00 shown in this block. Note: the LP SMART tile lower on the page (below Job Photos) does show '$0.00' but that is a separate lp-material-list summary block and not the StickyBar.
critical_code_review_comments: Model Comparison panel is gated behind modelHistory.length > 0 (AIMeasureButton.jsx:3382). For estimates with only one AI run (like this one) the panel is not visible at all — the cost-redaction fix is intrinsically safe because the surface itself is absent. The footnote text 'Cost is an approximation using published list prices' at line 3424 still lives in the DOM only when the panel renders; it is descriptive text (no actual $ values). Consider whether that footnote is now stale copy since the Cost column has been removed.

AIExtractionDebugModal in the resumed-run flow does NOT expose a multi-run picker (no debug-run-* rows). Task 3's cost-scan on run-picker rows is therefore vacuously satisfied for this estimate. If a picker exists in a different entry path, testing agent could not reach it from this estimate.
seed_data_creation: None — only resumed existing done run d6679448 (no new AI/photo/blueprint runs started, no data modified). OpeningsReviewCard delete-guard was tested with Cancel only — no openings removed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Estimate 8f95c9c2-add9-416a-92f3-786a4ea2ce83 is a real owner LP-smart estimate with 1 AI run d6679448 (22 material lines already imported). AI Measure modal auto-resumes via [data-testid=ai-measure-resume-btn] after dismissing the 'PHOTO CHECKLIST' onboarding backdrop (button: GOT IT, DON'T SHOW AGAIN). To reach the Extraction Debug view: click ai-measure-advanced-toggle then ai-measure-debug-btn. 3D materials heading testid appears twice in DOM (once inside ai-measure-3d-panel and once inside lp-material-3d) — scope selectors to '[data-testid="ai-measure-modal"]' when asserting in-modal only. The lp-openings-review-card key format is 'open:<run_id>:<idx>' — the corresponding testids are lp-or-remove-open:<run>:<idx>, lp-or-remove-anyway-open:<run>:<idx>, lp-or-remove-cancel-open:<run>:<idx>.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs. All four ruled fixes (cost redaction in Model Comparison + Debug, LP-native 3D materials pin, StickyBar derived-unapplied label, openings-review 'Not present' delete-guard) verified holding on this real presenter estimate.
